creditCards.name: Chase Sapphire Preferred
creditCards.signupBonus: 60,000 bonus points after spending $4,000 in first 3 months

rewardsRate.travel: 5x points on travel through Chase portal

benefits: 25% more value when redeeming for travel through Chase

creditCards.name: Chase Sapphire Reserve
creditCards.signupBonus: 60,000 bonus points after spending $4,000 in first 3 months

rewardsRate.travel: 10x points on hotels and car rentals through Chase portal, 5x on flights
rewardsRate.dining: 10x points on dining through Chase Dining

benefits: 50% more value when redeeming for travel through Chase
$100 Global Entry or TSA PreCheck credit

creditCards.name: Chase Freedom Unlimited
creditCards.signupBonus: $200 bonus after spending $500 in first 3 months

rewardsRate.travel: 5% cash back on travel through Chase
rewardsRate.dining: 3% cash back on dining and drugstores
rewardsRate.all: 1.5% cash back on all other purchases

benefits: 0% intro APR on purchases for 15 months

creditCards.name: Chase Freedom Flex
creditCards.signupBonus: $200 bonus after spending $500 in first 3 months

rewardsRate.rotating: 5% cash back on rotating categories (up to $1,500/quarter, activation required)

benefits: 0% intro APR on purchases for 15 months

creditCards.name: Amazon Prime Visa
creditCards.signupBonus: $150 Amazon gift card instantly upon approval

rewardsRate.amazon: 5% back at Amazon.com, Amazon Fresh, and Whole Foods (with Prime membership)
rewardsRate.transit: 2% back on local transit and commuting

benefits: No annual fee (requires Amazon Prime membership at $139/year)

creditCards.name: Chase Ink Business Preferred
creditCards.signupBonus: 100,000 bonus points after spending $8,000 in first 3 months

rewardsRate.advertising: 3x points on advertising purchases (social media and search engines)
rewardsRate.internet: 3x points on internet, cable, and phone services
rewardsRate.other: 1x points on all other purchases (3x categories cap at $150,000/year)

benefits: 25% more value when redeeming for travel through Chase
Transfer points to airline and hotel partners

creditCards.name: Chase Ink Business Unlimited
creditCards.signupBonus: $750 bonus cash back after spending $6,000 in first 3 months
benefits: 0% intro APR on purchases for 12 months
Employee cards at no additional cost

creditCards.name: Marriott Bonvoy Boundless
creditCards.signupBonus: 3 Free Night Awards after spending $3,000 in first 3 months, plus 1 additional Free Night after $4,000 total in 4 months

rewardsRate.marriott: 6x points per $1 at participating Marriott hotels

benefits: Free Night Award each account anniversary (up to 35,000 points value)
Automatic Marriott Bonvoy Silver Elite status
15 Elite Night Credits toward next status level

creditCards.name: World of Hyatt Credit Card
creditCards.signupBonus: Up to 60,000 bonus points: 30,000 after spending $3,000 in first 3 months, plus up to 30,000 more (2x on up to $15,000 in first 6 months)

rewardsRate.hyatt: 4x points at Hyatt hotels (up to 9x total with Hyatt membership)
rewardsRate.airlines: 2x points on airline tickets purchased directly from airlines
rewardsRate.transit: 2x points on local transit and commuting
rewardsRate.gym: 2x points on gym and fitness club memberships

benefits: Free night at Category 1-4 Hyatt hotel each card anniversary
Extra free night at Cat 1-4 after spending $15,000 in a calendar year
Automatic World of Hyatt Discoverist status
5 qualifying night credits toward next tier

creditCards.name: Southwest Rapid Rewards Plus
creditCards.signupBonus: 50,000 bonus points after spending $1,000 in first 3 months

rewardsRate.gas: 2x points at gas stations (up to $5,000/year combined)
rewardsRate.groceries: 2x points at grocery stores (up to $5,000/year combined)
rewardsRate.transit: 2x points on local transit and commuting
rewardsRate.internet: 2x points on internet, cable, and phone services

creditCards.name: United Gateway Card
creditCards.signupBonus: 30,000 bonus miles after spending $1,000 in first 3 months

rewardsRate.transit: 2x miles on local transit and commuting

benefits: 0% intro APR on purchases for 12 months
25% back as statement credit on United inflight food, drinks, and Wi-Fi
Two free checked bags after spending $10,000/year
